description: Create an interactive GeoGebra applet demonstrating the de Casteljau algorithm for a cubic Bézier curve using control points P0(0,0), P1(1,3), P2(4,3), and P3(5,0). The applet must include a slider 't' (0 to 1), the control polygon segments, the intermediate de Casteljau points that move with 't', the final point on the curve, and the full cubic Bézier curve trace. Save the project as 'bezier_decasteljau.ggb' in '~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/'.
